name: Somnigroup International Inc.
description: Somnigroup International Inc is a bedding company, dedicated to improving people's lives through good sleep. With superior capabilities in design, manufacturing, distribution and retail, It delivers breakthrough sleep solutions and serves the evolving needs of consumers in more than 100 countries world-wide through its fully-owned businesses Mattress Firm, Tempur Sealy North America and Tempur Sealy International. The company's portfolio includes the brand such as Tempur-Pedic, Sealy and Stearns & Foster, and its Multinational omnichannel platform enables the company to meet consumers wherever shop, offering a personal connection and innovation to provide a retail experience and tailored solutions.
